content.en:
One by one, the Heavenly Soul Fruits fell into Ye Tian's hands and were included in the inner universe by Ye Tian.

The value of each Heavenly Soul Fruit was unimaginable, and so many Heavenly Soul Fruits fell into Ye Tian's hands, which made Ye Tian extremely excited.

Such a big harvest is enough to make Dao Ancestor's heart move.

Ye Tian's speed was very fast, and in a short time, he collected almost more than 80,000 Heavenly Soul Fruits, originally there were 100,000 Heavenly Soul Fruits, but during this time, many True Monarchs came here, and almost every True Monarch came to the Heavenly Soul Tree and took away a Heavenly Soul Fruit.

Therefore, the number of Heavenly Soul Fruits here is only more than 80,000.

Now, Ye Tian took advantage of the fact that the prohibition here had dissipated to the point of almost nothing, and he wantonly scraped the Heavenly Soul Fruit here, and he made a lot of money.

After collecting the Heavenly Soul Fruit, Ye Tian no longer stayed here, but quickly walked towards the Dao Law Pavilion.

The large amount of inheritance of the Dao Law Pavilion is also unimaginable wealth, especially the remaining inheritance of the Eight Great Dao Techniques, which is the inheritance that Ye Tian wants the most.

When Ye Tian arrived at the Dao Law Pavilion, the incarnation of the Four Great Dao Ancestors also came here, obviously the battle was over, and the True Monarch puppets and True Monarch puppets were almost all killed by the incarnations of the Four Great Dao Ancestors.

At this time, the entire dojo was crumbling, and spatial cracks were all over the dojo.

Thundered!!!!

The incarnation of the Four Great Dao Ancestors frantically attacked the Dao Law Pavilion, and the forbidden formation of the Dao Law Pavilion was already countless times weaker, coupled with the attack of the Dao Ancestor incarnation, it could not be maintained at all.

Click!!

The Dao Law Pavilion's formation prohibition was completely shattered, and even the Dao Law Pavilion was torn apart by the incarnation of the Four Great Dao Ancestors.

Ye Tian was not far away to observe the attack of the incarnation of the Four Great Dao Ancestors, and he had to admit that the attack strength of the incarnation of the Four Great Dao Ancestors was not very strong, but the level of strength was very high, and it contained a weakened Dao power.

This kind of power is enough to cause damage to the Dao Ancestor, and no matter how strong Ye Tian's strength is, it can't cause any damage to the real Dao Ancestor.

In other words, if Dao Ancestor was standing in front of Ye Tian, it would be difficult for him to hurt Dao Ancestor even if he attacked for hundreds of millions of years, but Dao Ancestor incarnation could hurt Dao Ancestor.

That's the difference in the level of power!

If it weren't for the fact that the power level of the Dao Ancestor incarnation was too high, enough to cause irreparable devastating damage to the dojo, otherwise Jiong of the Red Dragon Dojo would not be afraid of the four Great Dao Ancestor incarnations.

If Ye Tian attacked the dojo alone, Jiong didn't care at all, and he could easily use the prohibition to trap Ye Tian, but the prohibition of the Red Dragon Dojo couldn't trap the incarnation of the Four Great Dao Ancestors.

"I still underestimate the Dao Ancestor incarnation, although their strength is not very strong, but the level of strength is too high, if I fight with them, even in the face of the weakest Dao Ancestor incarnation, it will be difficult for me to kill them, I can only slowly consume them!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

can consume a Dao Ancestor incarnation, this is not a small difficulty, if it is not done well, the Dao Ancestor incarnation has not been consumed, and he himself will not be able to hold on.

Boom!

The Dao Law Pavilion was completely shattered, and rays of light flew in all directions.

These rays of light are all sect inheritances, and the Eight Great Dao Technique inheritances are also among them.

I saw that one after another Great Dao hands appeared in the void, grabbing those inheritance lights.

When Ye Tian saw this scene, he was a little moved, and he didn't know whether to make a move.

If he made a move, the four Dao Ancestor incarnations would probably not let him go.

"No, even if I don't make a move, but I have obtained so many Heavenly Soul Fruits, these four Dao Ancestor incarnations will definitely not mind killing me to capture the Heavenly Soul Fruit!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

After all, so many Heavenly Soul Fruits were enough to make their respective forces grow in strength.

Especially Tumen Dao Ancestor, he will take action against him 100%.

"It's done!"

Ye Tian also made a move.

"Black Wind Realm Technique!"

The power of the universe in the body extended to the outside world, turning into black fluctuations, enveloping this area.

In the next moment, the power of the Black Wind Domain Realm Technique restrained most of the points of light and pulled them into the inner universe one by one.

Then, Ye Tian ran for his life.

Escape!

Escape!

Escape!

Ye Tian knew his current situation, he was simply snatching food from the hands of the four Dao Ancestor incarnations!

However, Ye Tian was very smart, he didn't seize all the inheritance, otherwise the Four Great Dao Ancestors would have turned into terror and hunted him down.

He left behind a part of the inheritance, so it was impossible for all Dao Ancestor incarnations to hunt him down, at most only two to hunt him down.

But soon, Ye Tian miscalculated.

Because the prohibition of the formation between the dojo and the outside world has not disappeared, Jiong of the Red Dragon Dojo still controls the formation and does not let the True Monarch and Dao Ancestor incarnations in the dojo leave.

Although the formation prohibition at this time was already much weaker, even if the Dao Ancestor incarnation knew the prohibition extremely well, he didn't have a minute to break the prohibition and leave.

As for Ye Tian, he had little understanding of such a high-level prohibition, so he naturally couldn't forcibly break the prohibition and leave.

On the edge of the Red Dragon Dojo, Ye Tian looked at the two Dao Ancestor incarnations chasing behind him, and smiled awkwardly: "Two Dao Ancestors, I'm just joking with you, do you believe it or not?"

The Dao Ancestors who came after him were Tumen Dao Ancestors and Fengbo Dao Ancestors.

These two Dao Ancestors didn't say a word, and immediately made a move on Ye Tian, not giving Ye Tian a chance to delay time at all.

But at this moment, a voice filled the dojo.

"You all let me die, and when the master returns, I will definitely seek revenge on you!"

It was a roar of rage, and a cry of despair.

"Not good!"

The incarnations of the Four Great Dao Ancestors have changed color.

Tumen Dao Ancestor and Fengbo Dao Ancestor also stopped attacking Ye Tian, and used their defensive origin divine powers one after another, and they tore through the space one after another, trying to leave the dojo.

Boom Boom Boom !!!!

A terrifying explosion rang out, and the entire dojo exploded.

A large number of buildings were blown up one after another, and the power of the entire dojo also exploded, sweeping all around.

The light of destruction devoured all the light and energy around it, turning into a black hole in the area of the battlefield ruins.

Whoa!!

One after another, the figures rushed out of the spatial hole in embarrassment, all of them very embarrassed.

Half of Lanyue Dao Ancestor's body disappeared, and several other Dao Ancestors were not much better, and they were all seriously injured.

And Ye Tian also rushed out, his hands and feet disappeared, and blood holes appeared in his chest, and the whole person was seriously injured.

Jiong's devastating attack, at the cost of the destruction of the dojo, almost killed him.

If it weren't for the fact that he had the two great origin powers of the three-element unity and the blood river true body, and all the divine power and soul power were all converted into physical power, which greatly increased his defense, otherwise he would have died.

In addition, this time his losses were significant.

Not only was he seriously injured, but even the strange object of the Barron statue was cracked.

Strange objects are not indestructible, and once the battle exceeds the limit, the strange objects will slowly damage until they are destroyed.

The Barron statue is still very considerable to Ye Tian's strength now, and now it is about to be destroyed, which also makes Ye Tian very heartbroken.

But now is not the time for heartache, the incarnation of the Four Great Dao Ancestors is not dead yet!

Swish!

Ye Tian fled quickly, while Tumen Dao Ancestor and Feng Bo Dao Ancestor reacted and also chased after Ye Tian.

Lanyue Dao Ancestor and Mengyue Dao Ancestor also hesitated, but they quickly made a decision and chased after Ye Tian.

Even if they would offend the Void Heaven Sect and the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor this time, they would not hesitate to do so.

After all, Ye Tian has a large number of inheritances and a large number of treasures, once he kills Ye Tian, the harvest will be too great!
